text: First time using the garage, highly impressed, completed repairs needed to get my car through its mot in a efficient and timely manner, I will definitely use again and recommend to others

I have used this garage for my M.O.T for a good few years now . They are very reasonable ,polite ,and excellent service .... wouldn't use anywhere else ! Great job lads I've recommended you to many friends and will continue to do so

Took car in for MOT today,failed on a couple of small things so I asked them to please fix them and put it through again,which they did,excellent service friendly knowledgeable people,great prices.will definitely recommend to all my friends,thank you so much for fitting me in and doing a great job 👌

Took my Mokka in for its MOT today. The gentleman that dealt with me was friendly and helpful. It’s the first time I have used this garage as I am not local to the area, but I will definitely use them again. Fab price and service.

Booked in MOT with just a days notice I had let dit slip my mind. Knew there were a few bits that needed doing that I knew would fail it so the lads carried out the work previous to the test. Still failed but only on brakes, new pads fitted and car picked up within 24hrs. Being in the trade myself I can see the work they've done is to a great standard. Great work lads and definitely didn't feel like I was being ripped off like when it goes to Renault, this is my place to go now!
